h1: Custom Coins for Recognition, Safety & Branding
metaDescription: Order custom challenge coins or commemorative coins for corporate awards, safety milestones, and swag. Low MOQs, free art proofs, quick turnaround.
introHtml:
Custom coins are die‑struck from brass, zinc alloy, or pewter to deliver a heft and finish that cheap plastic can’t match. Whether you need polished gold/silver, antique bronze, or a full‑color enamel infill, each coin is a miniature billboard for your brand. The raised or recessed design holds up to years of pocket carry, making these coins ideal for safety tokens, service awards, and trade‑show giveaways.

Because coins are compact and durable, they’re a favorite for HR directors launching employee‑recognition programs and for safety managers tracking milestone days without incident. Marketing directors also use custom coins as VIP credentials at events — they’re harder to counterfeit than paper badges and become collectibles that keep your logo in sight. Even small business owners can order runs as low as 100 pieces with a single‑sided imprint to stay on budget.

Production typically takes 10–15 business days after art approval, and we include free digital proofs. Decoration options include soft enamel, hard enamel, 3D stamping, and epoxy dome for extra scratch resistance. Add a custom velvet pouch or presentation box to turn a simple coin into a dignified award that recipients keep for years.

faqs.q: What metals are custom coins made from?
faqs.a: Most custom coins are die‑struck from brass, zinc alloy, or pewter. Brass offers a classic weight and is often plated in gold, silver, or antique finishes. Zinc alloy is lighter and more budget‑friendly while still accepting detailed stamping. Pewter gives a soft, matte look for premium awards.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom coins?
faqs.a: Our standard minimum is 100 pieces per design. If you need a smaller test run, we can accommodate orders of 50 pieces with a simplified tooling setup. Larger quantities (500+) reduce the per‑unit cost, so pricing scales favorably for bulk recognition programs.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer paid samples that include a blank coin in your chosen metal and finish. You’ll receive it within 5–7 business days. If you proceed with a production order, the sample cost is credited toward your invoice.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for coins?
faqs.a: The most common are soft enamel (recessed color, raised metal lines) and hard enamel (polished flush surface). We also offer 3D stamping for a sculpted look and epoxy dome for a glossy, scratch‑resistant coating. Full‑color printed coins are available for photographic designs.

Typical production is 10–15 business days after you approve the art proof. Rush service (5–7 business days) is available for an additional fee. Shipping time varies by carrier and destination, so please allow extra days for transit.

heroAltText: Custom challenge coins with gold and silver finishes, featuring company logos and enamel colors, arranged on a dark surface.
